Package com.salesforce.multicloudj.blob.driver

Class BlobSpanNames

java.lang.Object
com.salesforce.multicloudj.blob.driver.BlobSpanNames
public final class BlobSpanNames extends Object
Span names emitted by the BlobStore tracing layer when wrapping public operations on AbstractBlobStore, AbstractBlobClient, and AbstractAsyncBlobStore.
